effects.effect: Add 1 other [Boney] Vivosaur or [BareBones Brigade] card from your Discard Pile to your Hand.

effects.name: Bone Return
effects.effect: If this card is Discarded: Place this card into your FP Zone, then you can add 1 [Boney] Vivosaur or [BareBones Brigade] Card from your Discard Pile to your Hand.

effects.name: Boney Crush
effects.effect: Add 1 [BareBones Brigade] card from your Deck to your Hand.
